<USER_REQUEST>
im giving you a way better gym section, replace it with the current one i have. <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0b">
<title>Progressive Overload Coach</title>

<!-- =============================================================
     EDIT THIS BLOCK TO MAKE THE APP YOURS.
     Other people who fork this repo only need to change the values
     below — gyms, days, units, and starter exercises. Everything
     else (logs, edits, additions you make in the app) is saved to
     the browser's local storage on each device.
     ============================================================= -->

const CONFIG = {
  appTitle: "Progressive Overload Coach",

  // Weight unit shown everywhere. "kg" or "lb".
  units: "kg",

  // Gyms you train at. Add as many as you want.
